2153210.name: Trails of the Black Sun - Original Game Soundtrack
2153210.description:
Original soundtrack for Trails of the Black Sun.
Composed by Alex Dragusin.

INCLUDES


▚ MUSIC TRACKS Rediscover the TOTBS world in a unique way, by listening to the original music from the game.

▚ BONUS TRACKS You think you heard it all? Check out other bonus soundtracks exclusively in this collection.

▚ MORE MUSIC As the game expands, new soundtracks will be added to this collection.

THE GAME


Trails of the Black Sun is a first-person shooter and platformer hybrid, set in a digital simulation, where you, an Initiate, will have to find hidden artifacts and forbidden meanings. Use your acrobatic skills and defeat your enemies, fulfilling your ultimate Quest.
